Our Story

“They have a wide array of the warm, spicy and smoky scents
that I love. They’re richly scented but delicate enough not to aggravate
my scent-triggered migraines (and I find the fellas like them, too).”

“They have a wide array of the warm, spicy and smoky scents
that I love. They’re richly scented but delicate enough not to aggravate
my scent-triggered migraines (and I find the fellas like them, too).”

“They have a wide array of the warm, spicy and smoky scents
that I love. They’re richly scented but delicate enough not to aggravate
my scent-triggered migraines (and I find the fellas like them, too).”

We are Brooklyn Candle Studio. We create otherworldly botanical fragrances inspired by the beauty of nature and the wonder of travel. We pride ourselves on our use of sustainable materials, ethical production, and meticulous craftsmanship.
